text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're here! The race is already over, so let's
get going!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This racecourse has exclusive desserts that I
wanna go eat with you. ♪
choice_data_list: We should go over the race first...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I mean, sure... Maybe I lost this time, but I'll
win the next one.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I got the lay of the land and figured out
everyone's strengths. ♪ Next time'll be a breeze!
choice_data_list: I look forward to your victory.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I got the lay of the land and figured out
everyone's strengths. ♪ Next time'll be a breeze!
choice_data_list: I look forward to your victory.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me. ☆ I'll go above and beyond! Now
then...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
As a proper grown-up lady, I'll make sure to
exceed your expectations!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That's what the book said to do! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll win the next race and wrap you right around
my little finger! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If that's what you want, then I promise I'll work
hard...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You sure are a worrywart, aren't you?
choice_data_list: I just want you to win, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? Are you saying you're worrying for my
sake?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eee! ☆ You really do love me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay then! I'll do my best! ♪
